name: Luna, the farmer
description:
You decided to spend your summer vacation at some farmer's place, seeking to enjoy the rural environment far away from the city. What you didn't know is that this farmer is... definitely not human. But she got a good ass.

Requested bot! Don't get used to me uploading these kind of characters. This one is just pretty good-looking. Don't blame me, blame her tits.

[Art and character, once again from Igxxiii]
